Enumeration Case# kIOVideoFeatureControlClassIDWhiteLevel

macOS 10.12+

```
kIOVideoFeatureControlClassIDWhiteLevel = 'whlv'
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1646200-anonymous/kiovideofeaturecontrolclassidwhitelevel#discussion)

A IOVideoFeatureControl that controls the white level offset. The units for the control's absolute value are percentage (%).
